name: Bootstrap an original Codex autoresearch bundle
acceptance_tests: Helper scripts can initialize state and results artifacts in a temporary repo
Recording an iteration updates the TSV log and state counters correctly
Supervisor status returns deterministic stop or relaunch decisions
Bundle is installed globally or in the target repo skill path and can be invoked as $codex-autoresearch
Repository is published to a new public GitHub repo
notes: Initial build based on the public reference repo architecture, but implemented as a smaller original bundle. Remaining work: verify with pytest after reboot, install for Codex app use, and publish to a public GitHub repository. Current blocker: shell bridge failed in-session with a managed Windows PowerShell loader error 8009001d, so git and test commands could not be executed.
